description: Destroy-capability. Pins the shared bypass gate (confirm alone with a valid key_id), the negative-key_id rejection, and the revoke DELETE by ID.

cases.name: confirm alone is blocked by the destroy gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_object_storage_key_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)

cases.name: rejects negative key_id
cases.expect_error: key_id is required and must be a positive integer
